tools.manualInstall: Install Git for Windows and ensure `git` is available on PATH.
Install Python 3.10 or newer and include the Python launcher.
Install the current Node.js LTS release.
npm is expected to ship with the supported Node.js install.

providers.upstream: Operator-selected local runtime source such as Ollama or llama.cpp using the documented LLaMA 3.1 8B Q4_K_M baseline.
providers.manualInstall: Place the approved local LLM payload under the expected LLM models root or configure the runtime to point there. Capture the exact runtime choice in later provider settings instead of committing the payload.
Download the Faster-Whisper Medium files from the upstream release page and extract them under the STT models root using the expected folder name.
Download the Faster-Whisper Small files only if you want the lower-VRAM fallback available on the machine.

providers.upstream: Use the project-approved GPT-SoVITS upstream release or fork selected for the environment; do not commit vendor payloads.
providers.manualInstall: Install or extract the selected GPT-SoVITS runtime under the TTS models root and keep any voice-specific weights alongside that runtime in local storage only.
Download the embedding model files into the embeddings root using the expected folder name.
Add the MiniLM-L6-v2 payload only if you need the lighter fallback path available on the machine.
Install Ollama if you plan to run the LLM baseline through it, then place any machine-local shim or notes under the providers root instead of committing them.
